name: python3-mergedeep
title: python3-mergedeep
summary: Deep merge function for Python (Python3 version)
description:
Deep merge function for Python (Python3 version)
This library can help if you need to do some deep merge without mutating
the source dicts or while you want to deep merging into an existing dict.
It provides various merge strategies (Replace, Additive, Typesafe replace,
or Typesafe additive).
.
This package contains the Python 3 version of the library.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-mergedeep because Deep merge function for Python (Python3 version).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-mergedeep as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-mergedeep with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-mergedeep --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
